title: A glass envelope
question: 把今天课文里“偶然认识 -> 同龄朋友 -> 稳定联系 -> 选择可靠方式”的结构放进你的生活。这一题不鼓励陌生匿名联系，只写家长或老师知道的安全通信。用 word bank 填 4 个空。
example_answer: I never dreamed of receiving a message from a camp friend. She is of my own age. Now we write to each other regularly. Messages are faster and more reliable.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 偶然连接：你没有想到会收到谁的消息
options.english_template: I never dreamed of receiving a message from ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 同龄关系：对方和你差不多大

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 稳定联系：你们现在互相联系，而且不是只联系一次

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 可靠方式：你选择一种更快或更稳定的通信方式
options.english_template: We use ___ because it is faster and more reliable.
